---
title: "Pablo Valenzuela"
---

## About me

I work in the  [SEG research group](https://seg.inf.unibe.ch) at the [University of Bern](https://www.unibe.ch/), Switzerland, supervised by Prof. Timo Kehrer and Emeritus Prof. Oscar Nierstrasz. Previously, I completed my master's and bachelor's degrees at the [Universidad de La Frontera](https://www.ufro.cl/), Chile. 

My research interests include software maintenance and evolution, mining software repositories, and empirical software engineering.
